Helix Security Systems

Enterprise-grade security infrastructure for the modern cloud

PRINCIPAL SECURITY ENGINEER

San Francisco, CA (Remote Eligible) · Full-time · $280,000 - $380,000 USD annually

We are seeking a Principal Security Engineer to lead the technical vision and strategy of our security

architecture across all organizational domains. This is a high-impact role where you will define

secure-by-design principles, guide architectural decisions, mentor senior engineers, and drive cross-

functional security initiatives. You will report directly to the VP of Security Engineering and own the

long-term security posture of both our platform and internal infrastructure.

ABOUT US

Helix Security Systems is a cutting-edge cybersecurity platform company that empowers enterprises

to build resilient, zero-trust architectures across hybrid cloud environments. Founded in 2015, we

serve Fortune 500 companies and innovative startups with integrated threat detection, compliance
automation, and vulnerability management solutions. Our mission is to make enterprise security

accessible, intelligent, and proactive.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Define and evolve organization-wide security architecture patterns, threat models, and secure
coding standards that influence product development across all teams

Lead comprehensive threat modeling exercises for new features and acquisitions using
OWASP frameworks, establishing baseline security requirements before engineering begins

Architect and oversee the implementation of SIEM and threat detection infrastructure using
tools like Splunk and AWS CloudTrail, ensuring visibility into security events across all

environments

Drive AppSec initiatives including secure SDLC integration, static/dynamic analysis tool
selection, and establish metrics for security effectiveness across the product pipeline

Conduct strategic penetration testing engagements and threat simulations, synthesizing
findings into organizational security roadmaps and guiding remediation strategies

Establish and maintain AWS IAM policy frameworks and least-privilege access models,
ensuring security best practices are embedded into infrastructure-as-code across the
organization

Mentor and develop a team of staff and senior security engineers, providing technical guidance
on complex security problems and fostering a culture of security excellence

Collaborate with product, infrastructure, and compliance leadership to align security initiatives
with business goals and regulatory requirements (SOC 2, ISO 27001)

Evaluate and recommend emerging security tools, frameworks, and technologies (Python-

based security automation, threat intelligence platforms) based on organizational needs and

 technical feasibility

REQUIRED

12+ years of hands-on cybersecurity experience, with at least 5 years in a senior or principal-

level role driving organization-wide security strategy

Deep expertise in threat modeling methodologies (OWASP, STRIDE) and ability to translate

threats into secure architecture requirements

Demonstrated expertise in AppSec practices including secure SDLC, code review, vulnerability

management, and secure cryptography implementation

Strong proficiency with cloud security, particularly AWS (IAM, VPC, KMS, CloudTrail,

GuardDuty) and infrastructure-as-code security patterns

Hands-on experience with SIEM platforms (Splunk, ELK, Datadog) and security

monitoring/alerting at scale

Advanced Python or similar scripting language skills for security automation, threat detection

logic, and tooling development

Proven experience leading technical teams and mentoring junior/mid-level security engineers

on complex security problems

NICE TO HAVE

Experience conducting or leading penetration testing and red team exercises against
enterprise environments

Certifications such as CISSP, CCSK, or equivalent demonstrating security architecture
expertise

Background in financial services, SaaS, or other highly regulated industries

Familiarity with container security, Kubernetes security, or serverless security patterns

Experience with threat intelligence platforms and vulnerability databases

TECH STACK

OWASP (OWASP Top 10, OWASP Secure Coding Practices)

  Threat Modeling (STRIDE, Attack Trees)

AppSec Tools (Snyk, Checkmarx, Burp Suite Pro)

  SIEM Platforms (Splunk, ELK Stack)

AWS (IAM, VPC, CloudTrail, GuardDuty, KMS)

  Python (Security scripting and automation)

Penetration Testing Frameworks (Metasploit, Burp Suite)

  Container Security (Docker, Kubernetes Pod Security Policies)

Infrastructure-as-Code Security (Terraform, CloudFormation policy evaluation)

Incident Response and Threat Intelligence Platforms

BENEFITS

Competitive equity package (options pool for principal-level roles)

Comprehensive health insurance including medical, dental, and vision coverage with HSA
options

Unlimited PTO with encouraged minimum 20 days annually plus 10 company holidays

 Professional development budget of $10,000 annually for certifications, conferences, and

training

Flexible work-from-home policy with optional access to San Francisco headquarters

401(k) matching (up to 6% of salary)

Parental leave (16 weeks primary, 8 weeks secondary)

On-site wellness center, gym stipend, and mental health support (One Medical, therapy

stipend)

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your most significant security architecture

achievement, and a link to your professional profile (LinkedIn, GitHub, or personal website) to

careers@helixsecurity.io. In the subject line, reference 'Principal Security Engineer - SF'. Applications

are reviewed on a rolling basis. We prioritize diverse backgrounds and encourage candidates from

underrepresented groups in security to apply.
